LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_TopWarning: Changing these options will require restarting the game to apply. Some changes may not apply to pawns that have already spawned.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_BottomWarning: Don't see the options you chose? Restart your game!
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_AllowBattleReadyDesc: Turning this off will stop new hussars and uhlans from spawning with the Battle Ready gene. Already generated pawns will not be changed.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_MinimizeOverlapDesc: Selecting this will attempt to minimize the overlap of the Battle Ready gene. This will prevent pawns with the Brawler trait from getting genes that would give them Trigger Happy or Careful Shooter, and vice versa.\n\nEnabling this option will make pawns with this gene slightly more optimized, so disable if you find them OP.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_EnableDrawbacksDesc: This will give pawns a chance to spawn with a drawback trait to balance out the benefits of the Battle Ready gene. Drawback traits include Greedy, Neurotic, Psychopath, and Pyromaniac.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_DrawbackChanceDesc: Chance for a pawn to spawn with a drawback gene. The higher the number, the more likely they are to spawn with a drawback gene. The default is 10%.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_DisablePyromaniaDesc: This will remove Pyromaniac from the drawback gene list, for those who find it too troublesome to deal with.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_UhlanNameOptionsDesc: Will rename Uhlans to one of several options.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_OptionalHornsDesc: This will give uhlans the Mini Horns gene, reinforcing their fiendish appearance.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_OptionalRidgesDesc: This will give uhlans the Facial Ridges gene, reinforcing their fiendish appearance.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_OptionalGlidewingsDes: This will give uhlans the Glidewings gene, giving them a bonus to moving over difficult terrain. Removing this would be a good way to decrease their high metabolism.\n\nThis is the default option for VRE Hussars.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_OptionalGiantDesc: This will give uhlans the Giant gene, giving them many health benefits. Removing this would be a good way to decrease their high metabolism.\n\nThis is the default option for VRE Hussars.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_OptionalImpidDesc: This will allow uhlans a very small chance to spawn in impid raids, their natural strength allowing them to easily dominate the frail tribals.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_IncludeDesc: This will cause a percentage of hussars and uhlans (and any other pawns that have the Battle Ready gene) to instead be generated as they normally would be with Vanilla Races Expanded - Hussars.\n\nThis is NOT compatible with the Convert option below.
LanguageData.BioSynth_VREHussar_ConvertDesc: Hussars, uhlans, and any other pawns with a Weapons Aptitude gene will be converted on load to instead use the Battle Ready gene (following all the options for that gene).\n\nThis is NOT compatible with the Parity option above.
